name: Chocolate Date Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan over very low heat, melt chocolate chips, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla wafers, 1/2 cup powdered sugar, yogurt, and almond extract; blend well. Stir in dates. Refrigerate for 10 minutes to make handling easier.
2. Form the mixture into balls about 1/2 to 1 inch in diameter. Roll each ball in powdered sugar, then place them in a single layer in a large shallow container. Store covered in the refrigerator.
TIP: One package (10 oz) of vanilla milk chocolate chips can be substituted for the chocolate chips. Use 1/2 tsp. rum extract instead of almond extract and 6 oz of chopped dried apricots, also chopped, to replace the dates. Follow the same preparation steps as above.
